name: Mailchimp
description: Email marketing platform providing APIs to manage audiences, campaigns, automations, and reports.

auth_methods.note: Official developer docs describe both API keys (used via HTTP Basic or Authorization header) and OAuth 2.0 for the Marketing API.

credential_access.note: Could not verify Mailchimp API key creation/self-serve availability because the official Help Center article could not be fetched from this environment (HTTP 403 via CloudFront access restrictions). The URL is the official Mailchimp Help article the fact-checker referenced, but its contents were not accessible for confirmation.

api_surface.note: Marketing API is HTTP/JSON REST API covering lists, members, campaigns, automations, reports, etc.; docs list many resource endpoints and base URL format.

buildability.note: Public REST API docs and self-serve API key creation exist, allowing developers to obtain credentials and start integration immediately.

queries: site:mailchimp.com "How do I find my API key"
